description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push and on a scheduled cron job. Use an ubuntu-latest job with read permission to repository contents and write permission to ID tokens. Configure the job to run in a matrix with Python versions 3.7 through 3.11. For each job, check out the repository, install Poetry, set up Python with caching for Poetry, install dependencies, configure AWS credentials using a role ARN from secrets, and run tests with tox using Poetry.
